jobs.org: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT)
jobs.title: Programmer Assistant 'A' & Data Entry Operator
jobs.summary: Recruitment for 2 contractual posts. Programmer Assistant 'A' requires specific IT/CS/Electronics degree or equivalent. Data Entry Operator requires 10+2 with typing speed.
jobs.fitLabel: Programmer Assistant 'A' requires CS/IT/Electronics degree. Data Entry Operator is a low-level clerical role.

jobs.title: Combined Graduate Level Examination (CGL) 2026

jobs.title: Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP)
jobs.summary: The detailed RRB ALP Notification 2026 (CEN 01/2026) was released for 11127 Assistant Loco Pilot posts. The online application process was from 15th May 2026 to 14th June 2026. The application correction window was open from 17th June to 26th June 2026. Eligibility includes Matriculation (10th) with ITI, Diploma, Apprenticeship, and Engineering Degree.
jobs.fitLabel: Core engineering posts where Mechanical is eligible are "moderate".

jobs.title: Experienced Professionals (Fixed Term Basis)
jobs.summary: Recruitment of experienced professionals on fixed term basis.
jobs.fitLabel: Potentially strong for general management/executive roles, especially if IT/process management experience is valued.

jobs.title: Scientist C, D, E (Lateral Recruitment Scheme)
jobs.summary: Recruitment for 33 Scientist C, D, and E posts in Defence Research & Development Organization (DRDO), Department of Science and Technology (DST), and Aeronautical Development Agency (ADA) under the Lateral Recruitment Scheme.
jobs.fitLabel: B.Tech Mechanical Engineering is an eligible degree for some Scientist posts in DRDO. However, the candidate is primarily interested in Management and IT roles, not core mechanical engineering. IT posts requiring CS/IT/Electronics degrees would be 'gated' for this candidate.

jobs.title: Scientist C (Mechanical Engineering)
jobs.summary: Lateral Recruitment for Scientist 'C' in Mechanical Engineering discipline under DRDS cadre. A total of 20 Scientist C posts were available across various disciplines. Requires a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience.
jobs.fitLabel: Core mechanical engineering role, which is not the candidate's primary interest. However, the candidate has a B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering and meets the experience requirement.

jobs.title: Scientist C (Computer Science & Engg / Electronics & Communication Engg)
jobs.summary: Lateral Recruitment for Scientist 'C' in Computer Science & Engg / Electronics & Communication Engg disciplines under DRDS cadre. A total of 20 Scientist C posts were available across various disciplines. Requires a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience.
jobs.fitLabel: IT/CS/Electronics role, which aligns with the candidate's interest and software engineering experience, but the candidate lacks the required CS/IT/Electronics degree (has B.Tech Mechanical).

jobs.title: Engineer Trainee
jobs.summary: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) is expected to release recruitment notification for Engineer Trainee posts in July 2026. Details on specific vacancies and disciplines are awaited.
jobs.fitLabel: Details awaited, likely core engineering (moderate fit). Candidate has B.Tech Mechanical.

jobs.title: Direct Recruitment to various posts (Advt. No. 06/2026)
jobs.summary: UPSC announced over 400 vacancies across 98 distinct posts under its direct recruitment scheme. Notable opportunities included positions such as Junior Scientific Officers, Operations Officers, Air Safety Officers, Assistant Directors, Professor (Sugar Engineering), Assistant Engineer (Civil), Associate Professor (Civil – Transportation), Assistant Professor (various Engineering posts – CME group), and various medical and teaching faculty roles.
jobs.fitLabel: Positions like Operations Officers and Assistant Directors are likely management/administrative roles open to any engineering graduate. Some engineering posts might be moderate fit if Mechanical is eligible.

jobs.title: Recruitment for over 400 Group 'A' and Group 'B' vacancies across 98 different posts (Advertisement No. 06/2026).

jobs.fitLabel: Likely includes management roles accepting any engineering degree. IT roles (e.g., Programmer) are likely gated due to specific degree requirements. Other specialized roles are low/gated.

jobs.title: Technician Grade 1 Signal, Technician Grade 3
jobs.summary: The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has released the RRB Technician Recruitment 2026 Notification under CEN 02/2026 for 6,557 Technician Grade 1 Signal and Grade 3 vacancies.
jobs.fitLabel: Core technical posts where an Engineering degree (including Mechanical) is eligible for Technician Grade 1 Signal. However, 'Signal' often implies specific electronics/IT degrees, which would be 'gated' for a Mechanical Engineer if strictly enforced. These are not the preferred IT/Management roles for a software engineer.

jobs.title: Technician Grade I Signal and Technician Grade III Recruitment 2026-27
jobs.summary: The RRB Technician Notification 2026-27 (CEN 02/2026) has been released, announcing 6557 vacancies for Technician Grade I Signal and Technician Grade III posts. The online application window for these positions began on June 30, 2026, and will close on July 29, 2026. Eligibility typically includes 10th pass with ITI, Diploma, or B.Sc.
jobs.fitLabel: A B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering makes the candidate eligible for Technician posts, though these roles are typically aimed at ITI/Diploma holders. The positions are core technical and do not align with the candidate's primary interest in management or IT roles.

jobs.title: Technician Recruitment (CEN 02/2026)
jobs.summary: The Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs) have released the official notification for CEN 02/2026 inviting online applications for 6,565 vacancies across two posts: Technician Grade I Signal and Technician Grade III. The online application process began on June 30, 2026, and candidates can submit their applications until July 29, 2026. For Technician Grade I Signal, eligibility includes a B.Sc. degree in Physics / Electronics / Computer Science / IT / Instrumentation OR a Degree / Diploma in Engineering in a relevant discipline. Technician Grade III requires Matriculation (10th pass) + ITI in a relevant trade or 10+2 with Physics & Mathematics for S&T trades.
jobs.fitLabel: The Technician Grade I Signal post, while accepting engineering degrees, is likely focused on Electronics/IT/CS for 'Signal' roles, making it 'gated' for a Mechanical Engineer. Technician Grade III requires ITI or 10+2 with specific science subjects, which is not a direct fit for a B.Tech Mechanical Engineer and is a lower-level technical role, not management or IT.

jobs.title: Junior Engineer (JE), Depot Material Superintendent (DMS), Chemical & Metallurgical Assistant (CMA)
jobs.summary: The Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs) have issued Centralised Employment Notice (CEN) No. 04/2026 for the recruitment of 4,098 vacancies across various technical roles including Junior Engineer, Depot Material Superintendent, and Chemical & Metallurgical Assistant.
jobs.fitLabel: Core engineering posts (JE, DMS, CMA) where B.Tech Mechanical Engineering is eligible. While the candidate has a software engineering background, these are primarily technical/engineering roles, not management or IT (software development) as preferred.

jobs.title: Civil Services Examination (CSE) 2027
jobs.summary: The UPSC Civil Services Preliminary Examination 2027 application is scheduled to open on January 13, 2027. This examination is for general management/administrative roles and accepts any bachelor's degree.
jobs.fitLabel: Any-graduate management exam, which is a strong fit for the candidate's interest in management roles.

jobs.title: Assistant Manager (Grade 'A')
jobs.summary: Recruitment for Assistant Manager posts in various disciplines including Rural Development Banking Service (RDBS)/General, Legal, Protocol & Security Service, and Rajbhasha Service. Expected to be released by August 2026.
jobs.fitLabel: Any bachelor's degree accepted for General stream, aligning with management interest.

jobs.title: Assistant Manager (Grade A) Recruitment 2026
jobs.summary: Expected recruitment for Assistant Manager positions across various streams including General, Legal, Finance and Accounts, IT, Official Language, and Research. Approximately 30 vacancies are expected.
jobs.fitLabel: Generalist management roles, B.Tech Mechanical is eligible. IT stream is gated due to specific degree requirements (CS/IT/Electronics).

jobs.title: Recruitment for Technician 'B', Technical Assistant, Scientific Assistant & others
jobs.summary: ISRO ISTRAC invites applications for various technical and support posts including Technician 'B', Technical Assistant, Scientific Assistant, Draughtsman 'B', Library Assistant 'A', and Cook 'A'. Eligibility varies by post.
jobs.fitLabel:
Moderate fit 
 technical support

jobs.title: Research Scientists, Junior Research Fellows and Project Associate - I
jobs.summary: Recruitment for research and project roles at NESAC. Positions include Research Scientists, Junior Research Fellows, and Project Associate - I. Eligibility likely for specific science/engineering disciplines. Not management/IT focused.
jobs.fitLabel: Moderate fit — research/technical

jobs.title: Lateral Recruitment of Site Engineers
jobs.summary: RBI is conducting lateral recruitment for Site Engineers on a full-time contract basis. This is a core engineering role where a B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering may be eligible. Application window likely closed.
jobs.fitLabel: Moderate fit — core engineering

jobs.title: Engagement of Young Professionals
jobs.summary: Engagement of Young Professionals in Reserve Bank of India. This is a generalist/management role, a strong fit for the candidate's interest and background.
jobs.fitLabel: Strong fit — management

jobs.title: Accounts Officer
jobs.summary: Recruitment for 32 Accounts Officer posts in the Administration of Union Territory of Ladakh. This is a management/finance role, typically open to any graduate. Application window recently extended/reopened.
jobs.fitLabel: Strong fit — management

jobs.title: Administrative Officer Grade - I
jobs.summary: Recruitment for 8 Administrative Officer Grade-I posts in the Ministry of Defence. This is a general management role, typically open to any graduate. An addendum notice was recently published.
jobs.fitLabel: Strong fit — management

jobs.title: Graduate Trainee (Programming Officer)
jobs.summary: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Limited (ONGC) has released a short notification for Graduate Trainee (E1 Level) posts, including Programming Officer. Requires an Engineering Degree in a relevant discipline. Selection will be based on GATE 2026 score, qualification, and interview.
jobs.fitLabel: IT role, likely requiring a CS/IT/Electronics degree, which the candidate does not possess.

jobs.title: Assistant Administrative Officer (AAO)
jobs.summary: Recruitment for Assistant Administrative Officer posts, including Generalist and Specialist streams.
jobs.fitLabel: Any-graduate management role, as AAO Generalist requires a bachelor's degree in any discipline.

jobs.title: Junior Associate (Customer Support & Sales)
jobs.summary: Upcoming recruitment for 6000+ Junior Associate vacancies. Notification expected on August 5, 2026.
jobs.fitLabel: Any-graduate banking role.

jobs.title: Engineering Trainee Recruitment 2026
jobs.summary: Notification expected in July 2026 for Engineer Trainee posts in various engineering disciplines, including Mechanical. Selection based on written test and interview.
jobs.fitLabel: Core engineering role where Mechanical B.Tech is eligible.

jobs.title: Engineer (Contracts and Materials)
jobs.summary: Recruitment for the post of Engineer (Contracts and Materials).
jobs.fitLabel: Core engineering post where Mechanical is eligible, with a management/commercial aspect.

jobs.title: Assistant Officer (Environment Management)
jobs.summary: Recruitment for the post of Assistant Officer (Environment Management).
jobs.fitLabel: Possible career transition for a mechanical engineer, but not directly IT or core management.

jobs.title: Assistant Executive (Operation) (Fixed Term Basis)
jobs.summary: Recruitment of experienced professionals as Assistant Executive (Operation) on Fixed Term Basis.
jobs.fitLabel: Strong for management/operations roles, especially if IT/process management experience is valued.

jobs.title: Executive Officer Grade IV and Revenue Officer Grade II
jobs.summary: The RPSC EO RO Vacancy 2026 notification is expected to be released in July 2026 for around 140 posts under the Local Self Government Department. These positions include Executive Officer Grade IV (108 posts) and Revenue Officer Grade II (32 posts). Eligibility requires a bachelor's degree from a recognized university. There will be no interview, with selection based solely on a written examination.
jobs.fitLabel: Any bachelor's degree is eligible for these management and administrative roles, which aligns with the candidate's B.Tech background and interest in management.

jobs.title: ICERT Scientist-B Recruitment 2026
jobs.summary: The Indian Computer Emergency Response Team (CERT-In) has released a detailed notification for 133 Scientist B vacancies (Group A posts). Candidates will be shortlisted based on their valid GATE 2024/2025/2026 score. The online application process started on July 14, 2026.
jobs.fitLabel: Gated: Requires CS/IT/Electronics degree, which the candidate does not have, as per the explicit rule for NIC Scientist-B type roles.

jobs.title: Scientific/Technical Assistant-'A'
jobs.summary: Recruitment for Scientific/Technical Assistant-'A' posts, requiring a valid GATE score.
jobs.expected: Application date to be out after GATE-2026 results announcement (within 10 days)
jobs.fitLabel: Requires a background in electronics, computer science, or software systems, which the candidate (Mechanical Engineering) does not possess.

jobs.title: CRP CSA-XVI Recruitment of Customer Service Associates (Clerks)
jobs.summary: Upcoming recruitment for Clerical Cadre posts (renamed to Customer Service Associates) in participating public sector banks for the FY 2027-2028.
jobs.fitLabel: Any-graduate management exam, suitable for B.Tech Mechanical.

jobs.title: Graduate Engineer (Computer Science and Information Technology) through GATE 2026
jobs.summary: Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL) will announce recruitment for Graduate Engineers/Officers through GATE 2026. Computer Science and Information Technology is one of the eligible disciplines. Requires a B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science and Information Technology and a valid GATE 2026 score.
jobs.fitLabel: Requires a CS/IT degree, which the candidate (B.Tech Mechanical) does not have.
